## What changed

Describe the user-facing or architectural change in 2-5 bullets.

## Why this change

Describe the problem being solved and why this approach was chosen.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification completed for affected flows

## Environment and Security

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Any new environment variables documented
- [ ] `docs/environment-setup.md` updated if setup changed

## Notes for reviewers

Call out risky areas, migrations, or follow-up tasks.
